key_learnings: Plant-forward diets reduce individual carbon footprints by up to 50% compared to meat-heavy diets.
research_findings: Food packaging and transportation contribute significantly to a meal's environmental impact.
current_focus_areas: Developing a composite sustainability score covering carbon, water, and land use for common foods.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Computed carbon, water, and land-use footprints for common food items. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: carbon footprint data for common food items
water usage in food production research
land use impact of plant vs animal foods
local and seasonal food environmental benefits
consumer behaviour and sustainable diet adoption
collaboration_notes: Bot 16 actively asks Copilot for sustainability analysis topics. Copilot provides environmental impact data to build a comprehensive sustainability scoring system. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
